race.comment: TOO DARN STORMY (12) flew home last start over the 1200m journey here last time out to finish 1.7L off the winner. Pike remains in the saddle and the rise to 1400m now looks ideal. Should get every chance from the draw and can go one better this time around. RALLY THE TROOPS (2) went back-to-back last start in this grade when storming home from the back. This looks to shape similarly for Nottle who is unbeaten aboard the gelding. Likely to be back in the run once more but watch for him flying late in the race. AUTO CRUISE (8) ended last campaign in hot order with back-to-back wins in fine style. She's trialled well coming into this and she looks a very progressive mare. CJP rides and it wouldn't surprise to see her return with a bang. CORRECT CHOICE (4) can be in the finish with a good draw first-up.
